name: slot-math-studio-mobile
description: Capacitor native wrappers (iOS + Android) for Slot Math Studio. Wraps web/studio/ build in a WKWebView/Android WebView.

scripts.sync: echo 'Run npx cap sync after installing @capacitor/cli'
scripts.ios:open: echo 'Run npx cap open ios after installing @capacitor/ios'
scripts.android:open: echo 'Run npx cap open android after installing @capacitor/android'
